enabled.description: Whether to render the wand-workload-settings-defaults ConfigMap

config.description: Mapping of workload type keys to their default attribute overrides. Use 'All' for global defaults.

workloadAttributes.description: Default attributes for a workload type

controlled.description: Whether the workload is controlled by Wand

autoRollout.description: Whether to automatically roll out resource changes

skipLearningPeriod.description: Whether to skip the learning period before applying recommendations

setCpuLimits.description: Whether to set CPU limits on containers

enableInPlaceResize.description: Whether to enable in-place resource resizing

hardMaxCPU.description: Hard maximum CPU limit (Kubernetes resource quantity, e.g. '20')

hardMaxMemory.description: Hard maximum memory limit (Kubernetes resource quantity, e.g. '50Gi')

cpuLimitMinBuffer.description: Minimum buffer for CPU limits (Kubernetes resource quantity, e.g. '10m')

memoryLimitMinBuffer.description: Minimum buffer for memory limits (Kubernetes resource quantity, e.g. '512Mi')

learningWindow.description: Learning window in days before applying recommendations

workloadRuntimeBehavior.description: Workload runtime behavior hint for tuning recommendations
